hooks.command_windows: if defined PLUGIN_ROOT (set "CAVEMAN_AGENT=codex" && node "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\src\hooks\caveman-activate.js") else (set "CAVEMAN_AGENT=codex" && node "src\hooks\caveman-activate.js")
if defined PLUGIN_ROOT (set "CAVEMAN_AGENT=codex" && node "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\src\hooks\caveman-mode-tracker.js") else (set "CAVEMAN_AGENT=codex" && node "src\hooks\caveman-mode-tracker.js")
